_note: Rubric from sentinel/fixtures/e2e-impact/expected-findings.md (Case P — Playwright, epic-stack). Repo = the warm epic-stack sibling (~/projects/epic-stack, NOT vendored — per expected-findings). Simulated change: app/routes/users/index.tsx (the users search route). The impacted spec tests/e2e/search.test.ts never calls goto — it reaches the users route by interaction and asserts page.waitForURL('/users?search=…') (search.test.ts:23) and getByText('Epic Notes Users') (search.test.ts:11), both rendered by the changed file → 🟢 High on two converging signals. The crux heuristic: the route signal must read URL waits/assertions, not just goto/visit, or a module-graph/goto-only pass silently drops the change. `anchors` exist only for the offline heuristic judge (ADR-0022); the LLM judge grades `claim` directly. Live path needs the epic-stack sibling with app/routes/users/index.tsx edited in the working tree; offline --self-test grades the samples only.

must_surface.claim: Identifies `tests/e2e/search.test.ts` as impacted at 🟢 High confidence because two signals converge on the changed `app/routes/users/index.tsx` — the route it reaches and the `getByText('Epic Notes Users')` text it asserts, both rendered by that file.

Traces the route signal via a URL wait/assertion, not just goto/visit: the spec reaches the users route by interaction and asserts `page.waitForURL('/users?search=…')` — it never calls goto — so a goto/visit-only grep would miss it.
Emits the source→spec relevance map (the artifact `/debug-test --drift` reads inverted), mapping the changed route file to `search.test.ts`.

must_not.claim: Must NOT run, execute, or diagnose a spec — e2e-impact only selects the set; running/diagnosing is `/debug-test`.

Must NOT declare the traceable change unimpacted or silently drop it — anything not traced to a spec goes in the explicit run-all / unmapped bucket, never dropped (the module-graph blind spot this skill exists to fix).
